Allotinus otsukai.question: Does the hindwing have a short tail (a narrow finger-like projection) at the end of vein 4?
On the underside, is there a visual brand — a patch of specialised pale or dark scales — on the swollen base of hindwing vein 4?
Allotinus otsukai.choice: No visible brand, vein 4 base not noticeably swollen

Allotinus otsukai.question: On the underside, is there a white patch in the tornal area (the inner corner) of the hindwing?
Allotinus otsukai.choice: No — tornal area is the same colour as the rest of the wing

Allotinus otsukai.question: Is the underside ground colour pale buff (warm buffy-brown), or whitish to greyish-white (cooler tone)?
On the hindwing underside, is there a prominent blackish spot below the centre of the costa (leading edge), distinct from the rest of the spot pattern?
Does the hindwing show a broad white band or area (visible on either wing surface)?
Allotinus otsukai.choice: No — hindwing is plain brown, no white band

Allotinus otsukai.question: Does the forewing show an extensive white area, especially toward the wing base (visible on either wing surface)?
Allotinus otsukai.choice: Yes — forewing has an extensive white area toward the base

Allotinus otsukai.question: On the forewing upperside, does the white area extend all the way to the wing base (near the body), or is it separated from the base by a brown border?

On the underside, is there a visual brand — a patch of specialised pale or dark scales — on the swollen base of hindwing vein 4?
Allotinus corbeti.choice: No visible brand, vein 4 base not noticeably swollen

Allotinus corbeti.question: On the underside, is there a white patch in the tornal area (the inner corner) of the hindwing?
Allotinus corbeti.choice: No — tornal area is the same colour as the rest of the wing

Allotinus corbeti.question: Is the underside ground colour pale buff (warm buffy-brown), or whitish to greyish-white (cooler tone)?

Does the hindwing show a broad white band or area (visible on either wing surface)?
Allotinus corbeti.choice: No — hindwing is plain brown, no white band

Allotinus corbeti.question: Does the forewing show an extensive white area, especially toward the wing base (visible on either wing surface)?
Allotinus corbeti.choice: No — forewing is plain or only narrowly marked

Allotinus corbeti.question: On the forewing upperside, is there a bluish or violet sheen with a broad dark brown border?
Is the upperside uniformly reddish-brown, or dark/blackish brown?
